summary: Justin Brennan walks through the psychology and systematic process of investing out-of-state, emphasizing the need to move beyond high-cost coastal markets to scale wealth. He details how to properly set up logistics, operations, and market knowledge 6-8 months in advance before executing any deals, including property management, construction teams, and legal/accounting infrastructure.
takeaways: Invest in purple or red states only for fairness to landlords and tenants
Set up logistics, operations, property management, construction teams, and legal/accounting 6-8 months in advance before striking a deal
Drive the target market extensively to understand neighborhoods, path of progress, major employers, schools, universities, and city infrastructure investments
Install 6-8 cameras on every property to monitor in real-time from anywhere in the country
Establish relationships with multiple lenders, brokers, property managers, and construction teams before deals come across your desk
When deals start coming, you should already know the neighborhood intimately - street quality, nearby retail, schools, upcoming developments
Fail fast with underperforming team members (property managers, construction teams) and replace them quickly rather than delay

skill_candidates.change: Conduct systematic 6-8 month pre-deal market evaluation in target out-of-state markets
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin explicitly states 'set it up six to eight months in advance before you ever execute on a deal' and describes flying to Kansas City end of 2018 to interview property management, construction teams, understand zoning, path of progress, school systems, major employers, and city infrastructure spending

skill_candidates.change: Establish complete operational and logistical infrastructure (management, construction, legal, accounting, cameras) before sourcing deals
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin emphasizes 'Set up the logistics and operations in advance' and details having property managers, construction teams, accountants, lenders, brokers, and 6-8 cameras installed on every property before deals arrive

title: Lesson 3: Investing Out Of State
